Clean build, no errors. Done.

**Summary of changes:**

**`/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`** — Added two new functions and two new route handlers:

- `restCockpitMetrics()` — reads CPU delta from `/proc/stat` (two reads 500ms apart), RAM from `/proc/meminfo`, disk from `df -h`, and network rx/tx from `/proc/net/dev`. Route: `GET /api/cockpit/metrics`.
- `restCockpitContainers()` — runs `docker ps -a --format '{{json .}}'` and parses each line as JSON. Route: `GET /api/cockpit/containers`.
